news-global-econ.title: Seahawks GM warns Washington’s new 'millionaire tax' could hurt free agent recruiting
news-global-econ.description: Seahawks general manager John Schneider pointed to Washington’s new income tax rate on millionaires, warning it could hinder the franchise’s ability to sign top NFL free agents.

news-global-econ.title: Fmr. Obama Official Rattner: Lack of Immigration Isn't Hurting Job Market, There’s No Shortage
news-global-econ.description:

news-global-econ.title: Mark Levin: The Democrats are acting like they are rooting for the enemy | Fox News Video
news-global-econ.description: Fox News host Mark Levin argues that Democrats are opposing the Trump administration’s war in Iran for political means on ‘Life, Liberty & Levin.’

news-global-econ.title: Cigarette smoking in America plummets to historic single-digit low, new study finds
news-global-econ.description: US adult smoking rates hit historic low of 9.9% in 2024, marking the first time cigarette use dropped to single digits, but 25.2 million Americans still smoke.

news-global-econ.title: Protesters torch Communist Party HQ in Cuba as video appears to capture gunfire
news-global-econ.description: Dramatic footage appears to show protester on the ground after alleged gunfire as crowds attack Communist Party building in Cuba, chanting 'Freedom!' amid crisis.

news-korea-soc.title: Kim Jong Un appears with teenage daughter at live-fire rocket test in North Korea
news-korea-soc.description: Kim Jong Un's daughter joins him at missile test, fueling ongoing succession speculation as North Korea escalates weapons demonstrations amid regional tensions.

news-global-soc.title: Son of British couple detained in Iran 'let down' by Starmer's leadership on parent's imprisonment amid war
news-global-soc.description: The son of British prisoners in Iran slams UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer's 'non-existent' advocacy, urges President Donald Trump to remember prisoners during strikes on Iran facilities.

news-global-soc.title: With dogs, dance and uncovered hair, Iranians defy 'unholy alliance' of socialists, radicals: ‘Hypocrites!’
news-global-soc.description: Fox News investigation reveals 75 organizations supporting Iran's regime, including socialist groups allegedly funded by American tech tycoon in Shanghai.

news-global-soc.title: Bill Maher presses Gov. Josh Shapiro on Iran war, asks if 'you would still do nothing?'
news-global-soc.description: Bill Maher challenges Gov. Josh Shapiro on Iran policy during "Real Time" debate about nuclear weapons and Middle East military involvement.

news-global-soc.title: World Economic Forum faces fresh scrutiny as Epstein ties revive past scandals, criticism
news-global-soc.description: The World Economic Forum faces renewed scrutiny after Epstein links surfaced, adding to years of controversy surrounding Davos, leadership scandals and criticism of the globalist agenda.

news-global-soc.title: Stephen Colbert mocked by Variety over 'ego trip' as guests kiss his ring before May exit
news-global-soc.description: Stephen Colbert's "Late Show" final season criticized by Variety correspondent Daniel D'Addario as transforming from resistance to ego trip with celebrity guests flattering the host.
